summary: Tested individual employee hourly rates feature. All 30 new/updated tests pass. Backend: 100% pass rate for employee rates feature. Frontend: All inline rate editing and payroll report features working correctly.

details: GET /api/admin/employees returns hourly_rate field for all employees
PUT /api/admin/employees/{id}/rate updates individual hourly rate
Rate persists after update
Negative rates rejected with 400
Non-existent employee returns 404
Endpoint requires admin access (401/403 without auth)
Payroll report uses individual employee rates where set
Employees without custom rate fall back to default rate
has_custom_rate flag correctly indicates custom rates
Total wages calculated correctly with mixed rates (hours × individual rate)
Report settings indicates 'uses_individual_rates': true
Hourly Rate column visible in All Employees table
'Set rate' placeholder shown for employees without custom rate
Click on rate opens inline edit input
Enter key saves the rate
Escape key cancels editing
Success toast 'Hourly rate updated!' shown after save
Admin users show '-' instead of editable rate (correct)
Star (★) indicator shown next to employee names with custom rates
Rate column in payroll report shows individual rates
Gross wages correctly calculated per employee (hours × their rate)
'(individual rates applied)' text shown in report header
PDF export generates successfully
PDF includes Rate column with individual rates per employee
PDF content-type is application/pdf
PDF has correct filename in content-disposition header

passed_tests: POST /api/admin/payroll/report - total wages with mixed rates
Frontend: Hourly Rate column in employees table
Frontend: Inline rate editing with input
Frontend: Rate update saves via API
Frontend: Success toast on rate update
Frontend: Star indicator for custom rates in payroll report
